final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: museum exhibition panel, collectible cultural heritage reference chart
Primary request: Chinese ethnic minority costume deconstruction infographic in museum catalog style with realistic central figure, structural breakdown, material texture swatches, pattern symbolism, and color meaning annotations
Scene/backdrop: rice paper texture background in off-white, silk white, light tea color, subtle aged paper grain, museum display aesthetic
Subject: full-body standing figure wearing authentic Miao/Hmong traditional festival costume with intricate silver jewelry, embroidered jacket, pleated skirt, and ornamental headpiece
Style/medium: editorial illustration blending photorealistic figure with technical diagram elements, heritage documentation style
Composition/framing: structured layout with clear zones - top header area, left structural breakdown zone, upper-right material texture zone, middle-right pattern/color symbolism zone, bottom flowchart/summary zone
Lighting/mood: soft even museum lighting, neutral and scholarly atmosphere, professional and restrained
Color palette: warm paper tones (off-white, beige, light brown) as base, costume colors in indigo blue, vermilion red, silver white, black embroidery thread
Materials/textures: hand-woven hemp fabric, wax-resist dyed cotton, hammered silver ornaments, silk embroidery threads, traditional batik patterns
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰" / "苗族盛装结构拆解" / "蜡染工艺" / "银饰锻造" / "刺绣纹样" / "百褶裙" / "穿着顺序"
Constraints: all text must be clear simplified Chinese characters, no garbled text or English, maintain museum catalog professionalism, realistic material textures, accurate structural annotations
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photo feel, e-commerce style, anime illustration, cosplay vibe, messy annotations, incorrect structures, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
